title: salvia fruticosa subsp. cypria
intro: Salvia fruticosa subsp. cypria, also known as Cypriot sage, is a subspecies of the Salvia fruticosa plant, which is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which help to soothe sore throats and alleviate respiratory issues. The health benefits of Salvia fruticosa subsp. cypria include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve cognitive function, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
